creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213322
patch

OpenMPI 1 and 2 are deprecated. I'll eventually drop OpenMPI 4 in the ports three and remove the deprecated ones.

This patch moves the OpenMPI support to net/openmpi3 which is still supported by upstream.

The ports are:

biology/hhsuite
math/deal.ii
math/dune-alugrid
math/dune-common
math/dune-geometry
math/dune-grid
math/dune-spgrid
math/dune-typetree
math/dune-uggrid
math/mathgl
math/moab
math/vtk8
misc/adios2
net/aluminum
science/chrono
science/gromacs
science/hypre
science/lammps
science/latte
science/liggghts
science/sparta

I've tested all of them.

science/gromacs plist was failing for me when OPENMPI or MPICH are enabled.
